extension.summary: Populate missing metadata and artwork for existing library items.
extension.description: Library Updatarr scans your existing Kodi video library for movies, TV shows, and episodes with missing posters, fanart, or metadata. It applies local artwork and NFO files first, then uses your installed online scrapers to fill remaining gaps — without wiping the database or scanning for new files.
extension.news: 1.0.1 — Context menu label fix; cooperative scan cancel; en_us/English language files. 1.0.0 — Initial release.

extension.summary: Edit EDL and chapter.xml segment files for videos during playback
extension.description: Allows you to edit segment files (.edl and chapter.xml) while watching videos. Supports adding, removing, and modifying segments. Can be triggered via keyboard shortcut, the context menu, or Kodi's NotifyAll JSON-RPC. If the video has embedded Matroska chapters, the editor offers to import them on first edit (requires mkvextract).

extension.summary: Skippy: skip, mark, and edit video segments (intros, recaps, credits, and more) using local or online data.
extension.description: All-in-one Kodi companion for chapter-style workflows: automatically skip or prompt on segments, mark new ranges during playback, and open a full segment editor for .edl and Matroska-style chapters.xml sidecars. Highly configurable keywords, EDL action types, dialogs, and optional online lookups (TheIntroDB / IntroDB.app). Separate keymaps for marker (skippy_marker.xml) and editor (skippy_editor.xml).

extension.summary: Automatically seeks back 1 second after 5 seconds of playback to fix subtitle display issues
extension.description:
This service add-on automatically waits 5 seconds after video playback starts, then seeks back 1 second to trigger subtitle re-synchronization. This fixes the common issue where embedded subtitles don't appear until manually seeking backward.
The add-on runs silently in the background and only activates when video playback begins. You can enable or disable it in the add-on settings.

extension.summary: Github repository for Skippy - Video Segment Skipper for Kodi and companion Segment Editor
extension.description: Installs Skippy, Segment Editor and other Kodi addons

extension.summary: Shows Jellyfin trickplay seek thumbnails during video scrubbing.
extension.description: Reads or generates Jellyfin trickplay sprite tiles alongside your media, crops preview frames while you scrub, and shows them via DialogSeekBar skin properties. Optional ffmpeg generator writes .trickplay sidecars; configure the generator, press OK, then use Run on the add-on Information page for batch generation. Copy resources/skin-snippet/DialogSeekBar-skin.estuary.modv2.xml into your active skin and rename it DialogSeekBar.xml (take backup of old xml first!). Requires ffmpeg, ffprobe, dovi_tool.
